ml_weight_mode_source: expanded_tournament_validation (4 WCs 2010/14/18/22): dynamic gap-decaying weight HALVES worst-case upset regret (0.0129->0.0061) but aggregate Brier is within MC noise (0.02516 vs 0.02529). Kept FIXED as default; dynamic available via ml_weight_mode='dynamic'.
ml_weight_source: tournament_walkforward_validation (WC2018+WC2022): chosen 0.20 by robustness rule. Raw best aggregate Brier was 0.50 but flagged overconcentrated (hurts WC2018 upset >3%). 0.20 improves aggregate +1.49% vs Elo-only with worst-case regret <=3%.
notes: Match-level gate accepted ML (Brier 0.508<0.529). Tournament walk-forward then set the WEIGHT to 0.20 (down from the match-gate's 0.50) for upset robustness. use_ml_match_model=false fully reverts to Elo-only.
